form.layout: =========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== lineNo[行号] materialId[物料] uoMId[计量单位] =========>quantity[数量与价格]====== quantity[数量] unitPrice[单价] amount[金额(不含税)] =========>tax[税务信息]====== taxRate[税率(%)] taxAmount[税额] =========>reference[业务关联]====== invoiceId[发票ID] deliveryLineId[出库行ID] =========^audit[审计信息]========= remark[备注] createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]
